message:
test(core): add adversarial e2compr decompression tests

4 new tests exercising error paths in e2compr_decompress:
- gzip_garbage_input: 256 bytes of 0xFF → error, no panic
- lzo_garbage_input: 4 bytes of garbage → error, no panic
- empty_input: empty compressed data → valid empty output
- ulen_mismatch: wrong ulen hint → decompresses correctly anyway

These verify that corrupted on-disk compressed cluster data cannot
cause panics in the decompression path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
